title: Architecture
description: Architectural design: 4 CPĐT 4.0 layers, logical components, design principles, 3 mandatory architecture models (overall + logical + physical per NĐ 45/2026 Đ13), API aggregates. Tier 2 cross-stage. Consumed by sa-pro/tech-lead (Cursor when designing solution boundaries) + tdoc-tkkt-writer §3-4-6 (entirely) + tdoc-tkcs-writer §3.3 (3 mô hình mandate) + tdoc-tkct-writer §2.1 (kế thừa kiến trúc). Justified by: TKCS §3.3 (Đ13 BẮT BUỘC 3 mô hình), TKCT §2.1 (kế thừa), TKKT §3 (4 tầng), §4 (components), §6 (apis_aggregate).

purpose.description: 1-paragraph architectural mission statement. Source for TKKT §1.1 + TKCS §1.4.

cpdt_layers.description: 4 layers per QĐ 292/2025 Khung KT CPĐT 4.0. MUST cover all 4 layers when project is gov IT system. Hard-stop in intel-validator if 'giao-dien' or 'nghiep-vu' missing.

layer.description: CPĐT 4.0 layer slug. giao-dien=UI/Presentation, nghiep-vu=Business, du-lieu=Data&Application, ha-tang=Infrastructure.

display_name_vn.description: Vietnamese display, e.g. 'Tầng giao diện người dùng'.

description.description: Layer purpose + scope. Min 50 chars to prevent thin output.

components.description: components[].name belonging to this layer. Denormalization for quick layer-view in TKKT §3.2-3.5.

key_technologies.description: tech_stack[].id keys aggregated for this layer. Cross-ref system-inventory.tech_stack[].

design_principles.description: Architecture principles guiding design decisions. Min 5 (TKKT §2 mandate ≥5 principles). Examples: tách lớp, modular, security-by-default, dùng nền tảng dùng chung (CT 34 §6), open standards.

description.description: Why this principle, how it applies to this project.

components.description: Logical phân hệ catalog. Min 3 (per tdoc-tkkt-writer Step 1 minimum). Components are LOGICAL groupings (NOT 1:1 with services). One service may host multiple components; one component may span services.

name.description: PascalCase or Vietnamese title-case component name. Example: 'QuanLyHoSo', 'AuthService'.

purpose.description: ≥100 chars Vietnamese description. Cite owned entities + integrations + business capability. Generic statements without entity names rejected by tdoc-tkkt-writer Step 5 diversity check.

owned_entities.description: data-model.entities[].name owned by this component. Authoritative ownership.

exposed_apis.description: api-spec.endpoints[].operation_id exposed by this component (top 5-10 most representative).

depends_on_components.description: Other components[].name this component depends on. Used for dependency graphs.

models.description: 3 mandatory architecture models per NĐ 45/2026 Đ13 (TKCS §3.3). Each emits Mermaid source. ALL 3 required for TKCS export — block if any missing.

overall_diagram.description: Mermaid graph TD source. High-level architecture overview: external systems + main components + data flow direction. Used by TKCS §3.3 (mô hình tổng thể) + TKKT §3.1.

logical_diagram.description: Mermaid graph LR source. Logical components grouped by domain/cpdt_layer. Used by TKCS §3.3 (mô hình lô-gic) + TKKT §4.1.

physical_diagram.description: Mermaid graph TB source. Physical deployment view: zones + servers + network. Used by TKCS §3.3 (mô hình vật lý) + TKKT §8.1 + TKCT §6.1.

apis_aggregate.description: Aggregated API counts per module. TKKT §6.2 mandate (audience-profile bans listing paths). Pre-computed by from-code Phase 2; writers MUST NOT enumerate api-spec.endpoints[].path at TKKT writer level.

external_systems_summary.description: Aggregated view of external integrations for TKKT §3.1 overall diagram + TKCS §3.6 narrative. Pre-computed from integrations.json.

deployment_overview.description: 1-2 paragraph deployment narrative for TKKT §8.2. AVOID Docker/K8s words (use tropes per audience-profile).

architectural_decisions.description: ADR-style key decisions captured. Optional but recommended for non-trivial projects.

adr_file.description: Repo-relative path to full ADR markdown.
